nameMeaning: A combination of "sea" and "avalanche" meaning calm, deep, flowing, silent turbulence, and powerful.
bio:
Seavalanche is a white fox-cat creature with heterochromatic eyes, wore a golden necklace that has a gold stylized S-shaped pendant with a small heart attachment below it, matching her golden halo-like aether power concentrated on her back.

It is said that the world was incredibly peaceful when she existed. Seavalanche was seen as pure, bright, powerful, intelligent, and kind. But due to unknown factors, no one knows the exact appearance of the Myth Seavalanche anymore.
personalities:
**Traits** is the consistent outward behavior (what they are). 
**Values** is the internal beliefs / priorities (what they believe). 
**Flaws** is the weaknesses that causes problems (what hurts them). 
**Quirks** is the small habits / physical tells (what leaks through unconsciously).
values: peace, kindness, honestly, loyalty
flaws: too self-reliant, self-doubts, priority for others
quirks: panic attack whenever she can't solve things
lifeBackground:
Seavalanche was a ruler of an unknown past in her world. Until someday, she somehow was overwhelmed by many unknown factors that ended up pressuring her to retreat. In her own non-physical abode, she stayed and tried to recover her energy.

At some point in her stay, she decided to split her energies into five and let them explore in her stead, which then she realized it will result in her fainting and fell unconscious for an undetermined time. Fate says she will wake up when her fragments needed her the most.
bodyShapeDescription:
Seavalanche is a fully white fox-cat creature with a light blue-tipped long slender tail. She has heterochromatic eyes, green on the right, yellow on the left. Her eyelashes is quite prominent with her already huge eyes in contrast to her small pink nose.

She wore a golden elongated oval ring chain necklace that has a gold stylized S-shaped pendant (also symbolized infinity) with a small heart attachment below it, matching her golden halo-like aether power concentrated on her back. She also wore an almost transparent pink piece of silk tulle fabric shaped like a bowtie with a trailing fabric on her left upper-arm.

Under her left ear, she wore a pink earring that doesn't puncture her ear at all using a heart-shaped clamp and it features a pink tassle at the end of it. Her hands are four digits paws, while her feet are three digits paws, both have paw pads on it.
abilities:
- **One with Space**: Seavalanche uses her aether power to levitate and do telekinesis. With this ability, she can stay in the outer space without any issues for a short amount of time.
- **Permafrost Guard**: Seavalanche’s special ability to withstand and remain unaffected by even the most extreme cold temperatures, even if it approaches absolute zero.
- **Psionic Dash**: Seavalanche’s special ability to move to places in a short distance with no noticeable time delay.
- **Hydroforce**: Seavalanche harnesses her water attribute to manipulate any body of water. She can change the pressure of water to the point she can even wield any amount of water as a weapon.
- **Nature Regeneration**: Seavalanche's innate ability that uses her nature power to accelerate her body’s natural healing processes, even able to heal from severe cuts and bruises. This ability will not help much if the wound is bad and deep.
- **Instinct of Nature**: Seavalanche's innate ability that tapped into the mother nature's instinct to survive and grow. She can feel the change of air, water, wind, and other elements in the nature group whenever she wanted to. 
- **Celestial Blessing**: Seavalanche's entirely passive ability to absorb the energy emanated from celestial bodies, such as the sun, moon, and other stars and redirect it to heal her body and mind. It is so powerful it can heal and cure her completely from any injury and curse, but only in a very slow time.
moves:
- **Nature's Sweetness**: Seavalanche's new power gained from Vesnea when she found her Blossom Mode form. Her femininity aura are much stronger, it affects the vegetation around her. Her surroundings helps her amplifies the effect of this move to all direction, leaving her foes unable to escape this attack. It inflicts no damage, but causes the enemy to feel calm and at peace, which could make the enemy stops wanting to continue the battle.
- **Nature's Cage**: Seavalanche's final option of nature attack. She concentrated on the earth and trees surrounding the target, created a massive hole to swallow the target. Practically trapping the target inside the earth.
- **Sweet Beam**: Seavalanche shoots a beam of magical power towards the enemy. This magical power comes from her femininity, anyone around it will feel sweetness covering their whole body. It inflicts no damage, but causes the enemy to feel calm and at peace, which could make the enemy stops wanting to continue the battle.
- **Divine Lightburst**: Seavalanche channels her fairy power to summon a concentrated beam of magical light. This overwhelmingly powerful beam is able to obliterate anything it touches. It also radiates an immensely beautiful colors that affects the mental of anyone witnessed it, they will find their resolve weakened and their desire to continue fighting dissipating.
- **Neural Implosion**: Seavalanche’s final option of psychic attack. A concentrated attack targeting the target’s brain. A psychic force so powerful it collapsed any neural functions of the target’s brain until it is destroyed.
- **Stellar Beam**: Seavalanche shoots a burst of light of the power of the cosmos at the target. Even though it looks just like a harmless light, it actually deals massive damages and can knock out anyone not ready of it on its path.
- **Incredible Stellar Aura**: Seavalanche's ultimate move. Her Infinity Halo would glow so bright, it lights up every corner of the space around her. The light will only give constant damages to anyone intended to harm her. Meanwhile her injured allies will be healed a bit by bit. Any weaknesses in her attributes would be ignored for the rest of the time the aura is up.
- **Celestial Hibernation**: Seavalanche's final option of healing. In a rare situation where she urgently needs to heal herself from a very grave injury on either physical body or mind, she undergoes deep hibernation. In this state, she goes to her own sacred sanctuary and began slumbering. While in this state, she would absorb the energy emanating from the celestial bodies to heal her body and mind.

nameMeaning: An anagram of Seavalanche. "Vesna" is a feminine goddess in Slavic mythology. Sea + Avalanche. Calm and Powerful.
bio: It is said that when Vesnea received a part of Seava's power, she becomes more elegant and more powerful. The attained form felt similar to that of Myth Seavalanche's aura.
personalities:
**Traits** is the consistent outward behavior (what they are). 
**Values** is the internal beliefs / priorities (what they believe). 
**Flaws** is the weaknesses that causes problems (what hurts them). 
**Quirks** is the small habits / physical tells (what leaks through unconsciously).
values: accepted by others, able to help everyone around her
quirks: overthinking even the smallest thing
lifeBackground: In a dire times, Vesnea found herself needing to protect everyone she loves, but she lacked the power to do so. Her heart reacted with Seava's willpower, giving her a new form and power. The aura felt similar to that Myth Seavalanche's.
bodyShapeDescription:
Vesnea is a fox-like creature with flippers as her hands and a heart-tipped mermaid tail. Her pink hairs are flowy and graceful, while her foxy legs are small compared to her flippers. She got cute foxy ears and her small fangs sometimes are visible when she smiles.

In Seavalanche Mode, she gets taller, her ears also get taller. She has a scarf floating behind her back like Seava would. In this mode, her aura is so immense, everyone would mistake her presence as the Myth Seavalanche herself.
abilities:
- **Levitation**: Vesnea uses her psychic power to levitate.
- **Telekinesis**: Vesnea uses her psychic power to move things around.
- **Water Breathing**: Vesnea uses her water power to swim with no effort and can breath underwater.
- **Aqua Regeneration**: Vesnea's innate ability that uses her water power to accelerate her body’s natural healing processes, even able to heal from severe cuts and bruises. This ability will not help much if the wound is bad and deep.
moves:
- **Glacial Cataclysm**: Vesnea lowers her surrounding temperature to extreme levels, creating an immense and rapidly expanding ice field. In this field, massive ice formations and blizzards are materialized. Vesnea channels an overwhelming psychic force to hurl these icy masses and freezing winds toward her targets, engulfing everything in its path.
- **Scice Barrage**: Vesnea formed multiple Scice, each formed with razor-sharp tips. In her command, the multiple Scice take turns lashing out at the target in rapid succession, creating a continuous barrage of icy strikes. The relentless assault overwhelms the target, battering them from all directions.
- **Psychic Maelstrom**: Vesnea unleashes multiple powerful psychic waves relentlessly battering targets’ mind. The waves are so strong and chaotic, her targets might have hard time sorting their footing.
- **Tidal Force (Evolved from Aqua Blast)**: Vesnea shoot a massively high-pressure stream of water from one of her flipper. It is said to be able to bore hole into a mountain.
- **Lumina Burst**: Vesnea channels her fairy power to summon a concentrated beam of magical light. The light radiates a dazzling brightness so intense it’s capable of piercing through darkness and obliterating obstacles in its path.
- **Fairy Bubble Barrage**: Vesnea conjures a flurry of magical water bubbles with calming energy that once hit can cause her opponent to lose their will to fight. 
- **Sweet Beam**: Vesnea shoots a beam of magical power towards the enemy. This magical power comes from her femininity, anyone around it will feel sweetness covering their whole body. It inflicts no damage, but causes the enemy to feel calm and at peace, which could make the enemy stops wanting to continue the battle.
- **Aqua Recovery**: Vesnea collects water droplets from the air and covers her flippers with water. She would direct her flippers to a wound to recover it with the power of water. This technique is much more concentrated than her ability Aqua Regeneration, and can be used to others.

nameMeaning: A short version of Seavalanche.
bio: The village he protected were calling him as the Myth Seavalanche’s descendant. Seava is determined and always ready to help whoever needed his help. It is said that even the fiercest foe would cower under his appearance.
personalities:
**Traits** is the consistent outward behavior (what they are). 
**Values** is the internal beliefs / priorities (what they believe). 
**Flaws** is the weaknesses that causes problems (what hurts them). 
**Quirks** is the small habits / physical tells (what leaks through unconsciously).
values: accepted by others, able to protect everyone he cares
quirks: overthinking even the smallest thing
lifeBackground: Seava woke up in an unknown forest. With no memories intact, he wondered around and was chased by a group of treasure hunters due to a misunderstanding. In the process of escaping, he fell down a waterfall and was rescued by his inner power. A nearby medic took him and gave him the name Seava due to the similarities of his aura to the missing leader. Wanting to know more about the world and himself, he embarked on a journey.
bodyShapeDescription:
Seava is a fox-like creature with a scarf floating behind his back. He has two bushy fox tails, each with split tips. In his true Ascended form, he stands on his two foxy legs, exerting an aura that feels stronger than his size suggests. In a certain occasion, he will change form into his Normal form or Child form to conceal that immense aura.

Seava's foxy ears are quite tall, much taller than other foxes. His body is adorned by light blue markings of ice diamonds and also sea waves. His mid body is sand colored, covered by a big bushy neck fluff.
abilities:
- **Levitation**: Seava uses his psychic power to levitate.
- **Telekinesis**: Seava uses his psychic power to move things around.
- **Psyche Soothe**: Seava’s innate ability to heal his mental injuries. This ability will numb any sensations from any injuries for the stretch of a battle, promoting heightened focus to end a battle. A Lengthened use of this ability will strain Seava after the battle.
- **Aquatic Veil**: When Seava is underwater, he can summon a shimmering veil of air bubbles that surrounds his head. The bubble veil is created by his water aura, sustained by his psychic aura allowing him to breath effortlessly underwater. This ability also protect him from extreme pressure underwater.
- **Aqua Soothe**: Seava’s innate ability to heal his physical injuries. The restorative water washes over his wounds, promoting faster recovery and providing immediate relief. This ability will not help much if the wound is bad and deep.
moves:
- **Frost Force**: Seava lowers his surrounding temperature until it is cold enough that ice forms, then pushes all of it using his psychic power towards his targets.
- **Scice Attack**: Seava shapes water and ice into Scice. He uses Scice to bash, slash, wrap, or even convert it into showers of Frost Force.
- **Psychic Maelstrom**: Seava unleashes multiple powerful psychic waves relentlessly battering targets’ mind. The waves are so strong and chaotic, his targets might have hard time sorting their footing.
- **Aqua Freeze**: Seava shoot a concentrated high-pressure stream of very cold water from his mouth or between two of his paws.

SeavaのTempest Mode。

nameMeaning: A short version of Seavalanche. Tempest is to symbolize the turbulence in Seava's heart. But Seava chose to overpower and control the turbulence instead of letting it loose.
bio: Seava gained the power of Storm and it affected his form. His eyes glow bright yellow while the Scice become jagged and even more pointy. In this form, Seava is more focused on overpowering and controlling any obstacles more of because he is afraid of the uncertainty if it wasn't.
personalities:
**Traits** is the consistent outward behavior (what they are). 
**Values** is the internal beliefs / priorities (what they believe). 
**Flaws** is the weaknesses that causes problems (what hurts them). 
**Quirks** is the small habits / physical tells (what leaks through unconsciously).
values: accepted by others, protecting everyone he cares
quirks: static discharge, sharp movements
lifeBackground: In his journey, he faced a lot of struggles, externally and internally. Along the way, the pain became too much and he decided to unleash his inner storm power. In his Tempest Mode, he is fueled by the anger inside him, terrified of what he couldn't control.
bodyShapeDescription:
Seava is a fox-like creature with a scarf floating behind his back. But in this Tempest Mode, Seava looks very imposing with his bright yellow eyes and a jagged, repurposed, scarf of his that now looks like a weapon of war.

His body now has storm markings, his new cape is translucent gray with static electricity bouncing around it. His two bushy tails now are surrounded by gray clouds like a storm cloud would be.
abilities:
- **Inherit**: All Seava Ascended Form's Abilities.
- **Static Surge**: While in Tempest Mode, Seava’s body constantly generates a field of static electricity. This makes it difficult for physical attackers to touch him without being jolted, and it slightly increases his reaction speed as his nerves are hyper-stimulated by the electrical energy.
- **Storm Focus**: A more intense version of _Psyche Soothe_. Instead of just numbing pain, Seava enters a state of "battle trance" where his focus becomes razor-sharp and almost predatory. However, this causes much higher mental exhaustion once the mode ends.
moves:
- **Inherit**: All Seava Ascended Form's Moves.
- **Volt Lance (Scice Evolution)**: Seava thrusts his transformed Scice (the spear) forward, discharging a massive, concentrated bolt of yellow electricity through the tip. It’s designed to pierce through defenses with both physical force and electrical shock.
- **Thunderclap Burst**: Seava slams his paws or his Scice into the ground, releasing a sudden, violent shockwave of wind and electricity in all directions. This is perfect for clearing out multiple enemies at once or creating distance when he's surrounded.
- **Cyclone Lash**: Using the wind power inherent to the storm, Seava swings his Scice or even his tails to create localized, jagged mini-tornados. These aren't smooth like Zephyr Mode; they are chaotic and filled with debris and static sparks, meant to batter and shred anything caught in them.

name: Seava

caption.jp: SeavaのZephyr Modeの設定資料です。
Zephyr Mode。

nameMeaning: A short version of Seavalanche. Zephyr is to symbolize the turbulence in Seava's heart. But Seava chose to accept it and flow with it.
bio: Seava Zephyr Mode is achieved when Seava has accepted his state of uncertainty. In this mode, Seava gained the ability to move gentler and subtler like a calm wind. Despite his calm looks, he is still not an opponent anyone would want to mess with.
personalities:
**Traits** is the consistent outward behavior (what they are). 
**Values** is the internal beliefs / priorities (what they believe). 
**Flaws** is the weaknesses that causes problems (what hurts them). 
**Quirks** is the small habits / physical tells (what leaks through unconsciously).
values: accepted by others, protecting everyone he cares
quirks: rhythmic breathing, drifting gaze
lifeBackground: In his journey, he faced a lot of struggles, externally and internally. Along the way, the pain became too much and he decided to unleash his inner storm power. In his Zephyr Mode, he has realized the destruction that his anger can cause, so he has accepted the presence of uncertainty. With this acceptance, his movement is fluid and powerful.
bodyShapeDescription:
Seava is a fox-like creature with a scarf floating behind his back. But in this Zephyr Mode, Seava looks very calm and quite feminine. His hair is much longer that he tied it on the back. The scarves that he uses are now draped around his body with their translucent parts.

His eyes are cyan colored, and his body has cloud markings. His two bushy tails are now very fluid and wispy.
abilities:
- **Inherit**: All Seava Ascended Form's Abilities.
- **Ethereal Drift**: Seava’s movement becomes almost weightless. He seems to glide through the air as if riding an invisible current. This makes him incredibly difficult to track or hit, as his movements are too fluid and unpredictable for standard combat.
- **Flowing Mind**: A passive enhancement to his psionic abilities. Because his mind is in sync with the gentle wind, his psychic perception expands. He can "feel" the movement of air and water around him, giving him a 360-degree awareness of his surroundings without even looking.
moves:
- **Inherit**: All Seava Ascended Form's Moves.
- **Zephyr Ribbon**: Seava uses the two long, floating Scice ribbons to manipulate the air and water around him. He can whip them through the air to create gentle but precise cutting winds, or use them to wrap around an opponent and redirect their momentum, tossing them aside without much effort.
- **Mist Veil**: Instead of a protective bubble like _Aquatic Veil_, Seava exhales or summons a thick, swirling mist of water and psychic energy. This mist isn't just for cover; it’s infused with his psionic power, allowing him to sense exactly where anyone is inside the cloud while making them feel disoriented and calm.
- **Azure Current**: Seava directs a flowing, spiraling stream of water that moves like a ribbon rather than a high-pressure jet. This move can be used to bind an enemy in a swirling vortex of water or to carry himself (or allies) quickly across a distance, moving with the grace of a river.

name: Seravyn
nameMeaning: Based on "Serene" with a -vyn ending.
bio: Seava was reborn as Seravyn when she has accepted every parts of herself. As Seravyn, she is a disciplined, unapologetically feminine, authoritative figure. Her perfectionism put fear in her foes even if the battle hasn't even started. Despite her outward looks, no one realized she is actually very soft and really deserving of love.
personalities:
**Traits** is the consistent outward behavior (what they are). 
**Values** is the internal beliefs / priorities (what they believe). 
**Flaws** is the weaknesses that causes problems (what hurts them). 
**Quirks** is the small habits / physical tells (what leaks through unconsciously).
values: chosen the correct choices, independent
quirks: actually a soft girl, require acceptances, require affirmations
lifeBackground:
Seava was reborn as Seravyn when she has accepted every parts of herself. Having experienced in her inability to quell her anger, the turbulence in her heart, and also her inability to accept her imperfections, she has evolved beyond what Seava can become.

As Seravyn, she has changed her chaotic struggle into a disciplined determination. She has become unapologetically feminine, still a perfectionist although she has embraced that she is imperfect. Outwardly, she looks like Seava has transformed himself into someone very different, very authoritative, but no one realized she is actually very soft and really deserving of love.
bodyShapeDescription:
Seravyn is a fox-like creature that stands tall like an authoritative figure. Her hair is long and tied in a high-ponytail style. Her body has markings that really supports her to look like a strict female manager or commander.

She loosely wears a big circular thing called Infinity Bangle on the right ear. Her ears are tall and pointy, it looks like her ears are also somewhat closed, unlike regular foxy ears. Her color palette is a blend of Deep Cerulean for willpower, Glacial Blue for logic, Alpenglow Pink for self-love, Starlight Gold for authority, and Arctic White for structure. 

She also wears a collar and a transparent veil on her top. Her tail are one big bushy tail, with a pink underside. Her expression is typically composed, featuring half-lidded eyes and a slight frown. There is also a pink heart marking on her throat hidden by her collar. Her voice is loud and strict for most, but softens into a breathy whisper for those she holds dear.
abilities:
- **Gravitational Command (Evolved from Levitation/Telekinesis)**: Seravyn exerts her willpower to manipulate the gravity around her and her targets. Letting her to levitate, and also pin her opponents to the ground. 
- **Mental Fortitude (Evolved from Psyche Soothe)**: Instead of just numbing pain, Seravyn uses her intense logic and willpower to create a mental shield. This allows her to ignore emotional or mental interference. While it prevents her from being overwhelmed while it's active, overusing it can lead to a period of extreme brain fog once the battle ends.
- **Glacial Aegis (Evolved from Aquatic Veil)**: Seravyn summons a shimmering veil of frost and pressurized air around herself. Unlike Aquatic Veil, this ability also provides a layer of defense against both physical strikes and extreme environmental pressures, either underwater or in the sky.
- **Aqua Restoration (Evolved from Aqua Soothe)**: Seravyn’s innate ability to heal her physical injuries. Her body purifies the water used in this treatment, which will promote an even faster recovery then Aqua Soothe. This ability will not help much if the wound is bad and deep.
moves:
- **Glacial Decree (Evolved from Frost Force)**: Seravyn commands the temperature to drop instantly within a designated zone. She then directs the frost to crystallize into sharp icicles that strike targets with very high precision. 
- **Crystalline Edge (Evolved from Scice Attack)**: Seravyn shapes water and ice into weapon-like constructs (such as blades or whips). She can instantly transition these forms from fluid to solid.
- **Psychic Overload (Evolved from Psychic Maelstrom)**: Seravyn unleashes a single, devastating wave of pure, concentrated willpower. It hits the target's mind heavily, forcing them into a state of mental paralysis or total submission.
- **Absolute Zero Stream (Evolved from Aqua Freeze)**: Seravyn releases a high-pressure, hyper-chilled stream of water from between her two paws that is so cold it flash-freezes anything it touches. Furthermore, it also cause severe hypothermia for anyone around it.

nameMeaning: An anagram of Seavalanche. "Vesna" is a feminine goddess in Slavic mythology.
bio: Vesnea is being called the kindest of the village when she was brought in by an elderly. She would offer help to whoever she thought needed it. Cheery as she is, everyone would feel better after a hard day around her.
personalities:
**Traits** is the consistent outward behavior (what they are). 
**Values** is the internal beliefs / priorities (what they believe). 
**Flaws** is the weaknesses that causes problems (what hurts them). 
**Quirks** is the small habits / physical tells (what leaks through unconsciously).
values: accepted by others, able to help everyone around her
quirks: overthinking even the smallest thing
lifeBackground: Vesnea woke up at a forest border, near the ocean, saved by an elderly. Losing her memories, she continued her life with no other purpose than trying to learn about herself. Along the way, she somehow feel connected with the three colorful cats that were also saved by the elderly.
bodyShapeDescription: Vesnea is a fox-like creature with flippers as her hands and a heart-tipped mermaid tail. Her pink hairs are flowy and graceful, while her foxy legs are small compared to her flippers. She got cute foxy ears and her small fangs sometimes are visible when she smiles.
abilities:
- **Water Breathing**: Vesnea can swim with no effort and can breath underwater.
- **Aqua Regeneration**: Vesnea's innate ability that uses her water power to accelerate her body’s natural healing processes, even able to heal from severe cuts and bruises. This ability will not help much if the wound is bad and deep.
- **Semi-levitation**: Vesnea’s innate ability of levitation using fairy power, but she can only use it in a short time in a short distance.
moves:
- **Aqua Blast**: Vesnea shoot a concentrated high-pressure stream of water from her mouth or between two of her flippers.
- **Fairy Bubble Barrage**: Vesnea conjures a flurry of magical water bubbles with calming energy that once hit can cause her opponent to lose their will to fight. 
- **Sweet Beam**: Vesnea shoots a beam of magical power towards the enemy. This magical power comes from her femininity, anyone around it will feel sweetness covering their whole body. It inflicts no damage, but causes the enemy to feel calm and at peace, which could make the enemy stops wanting to continue the battle.
- **Aqua Recovery**: Vesnea collects water droplets from the air and covers her flippers with water. She would direct her flippers to a wound to recover it with the power of water. This technique is much more concentrated than her ability Aqua Regeneration, and can be used to others.

A stronger version of this move has the intensity of the light so high, everything touches it disintegrates.
- **Eternal Courage**: Korazu's boundless courage made a physical appearance as bright light, covering himself and allies. It boosts his own bravery, inspires the others around him to feel unshakeable confidence to face hardships. This move also affect anyone around him that is not an ally, lowering their confidence in their ability, weakening their morale and resolve to continue the battle. 
- **Darkness Eraser**: Korazu feels into his unwavering courage and radiates an intense, blinding light. This brilliantly pure aura covers every trace of darkness around him, obliterating those with ill intent.

name: Baldor

caption.jp: Baldorのオリジナル設定資料。

caption.en: Baldor laying on a grass. Moss seems to have grew on him.

nameMeaning: comes from "boulder"
bio: Baldor is a huge rock shaped like a big wall, composed of Basalt exterior with granite reinforcements and sandstone interior. Don't mess with him because even as huge and heavy as he is, he still can move quite fast with his two pillar-like arms beside him. He is very determined to outlast everything, even if hundreds of attackers fight him alone. With his root rocks, he also can't be toppled over by anyone except intentionally by himself.
bodyShapeDescription: A huge rock creature shaped like a big wall. Two round eyes visible on top of the 5 meters body, it's as wide as 3 meters and as thick as 2 meters. There are two burly hands on the side of the wall, some vertical reinforcements as the makeshift legs on both left and right side, and roots below him for added support. The roots consists of rocks tied with tree roots. The body is a giant rock composed of a combination of basalt exterior with granite reinforcements, while the interior is composed of sandstone. Basalt is extremely tough and dense, likewise with granite which is also resistant to erosion. Sandstone inner structure provides unyielding defense from impacts.
personalities:
**Traits** is the consistent outward behavior (what they are). 
**Values** is the internal beliefs / priorities (what they believe). 
**Flaws** is the weaknesses that causes problems (what hurts them). 
**Quirks** is the small habits / physical tells (what leaks through unconsciously).
values: the validation of being useful
quirks: stands firm despite anything
abilities: - **Natural Heal**: Baldor's rock roots always sap energy from the soil whenever he is disengaged from combats, recovering his stamina and health in the process.
moves:
- **Topplover**: Baldor press his body against the target, using his massive weight as a damaging move.
- **Pebble Shards**: Baldor summoned many sharp pebbles to pelt the target.
- **Unmoving**: Baldor endures damage by hardening his body.
- **Nature's Call**: Baldor summoned natural energy surrounding him to overpower the target.
- **Explosion**: Baldor's ultimate move, the one he doesn't dare doing because it means he is sacrificing his life. He will embrace all the power within him and then shove all of it outward, creating an explosion which can also destroy his solid body in the process. He ultimately will never use this move because he is determined that he can withstand anything without resorting to this move.
storyPlotDetails:
* **Antagonist behavior**: Scoffed at Seava's weak willpower to do anything. After being pelted by countless of sharp pebbles, Seava got down and didn't think he could win.
* **Demise**: Seava tries to warn Baldor of a massive storm comes in. But Baldor simply said he can tank anything. The storm swallowed Baldor and he got flung into the sky and fell down into pieces.
* **Character Analysis**: 
	- His size and weight make him terrifying—he’s not something you just "dodge" easily.
	- He forces Seava into a battle of endurance, not speed.
	- His overconfidence fits with this movement style: “I don’t NEED to move fast. You will break before I do.”
	- The storm completely negates his strategy—suddenly, he’s the one being moved, and he CAN’T stop it.

nameMeaning: Reckless
storyPlotRole: Teaches Korazu: courage isn't about being fearless, but it's acting despite fear
bio: Rakariki is a lean white-furred cat body adorned with yellow lightning stripes. He is a fearless cat due to his long winning streaks in his battles. That claim is proven by his lightning speed and his powerful lightning attack when it's raining. He has lightning-shaped fur on the tip of the ears and even the tail itself. He has a light blue collar on his neck and a yellow circle-shaped pendant as a physical proof of his courage.
bodyShapeDescription: Rakariki has a lean white-furred cat body adorned with yellow lightning stripes. His face has bright yellow eyes, yellow nose, and small fangs visible even with mouth closed. He has lightning-shaped fur at the tip of the ears. And the tail itself looks like a lightning-shape. His feets are three toed paws with one big yellow pawpad. He has a light blue collar on his neck and a yellow circle-shaped pendant. The pendant has two parts, the smaller one looks like a ring, while the bigger one looks like a solid-shut locket.
personalities:
**Traits** is the consistent outward behavior (what they are). 
**Values** is the internal beliefs / priorities (what they believe). 
**Flaws** is the weaknesses that causes problems (what hurts them). 
**Quirks** is the small habits / physical tells (what leaks through unconsciously).
values: always be the best
quirks: doesn't fear of consequences
abilities: - **Ultimate Reflex**: As if the yellow pendant on his neck were a talisman, he seems to always able to evade attacks using his reflexes even if he doesn't see the incoming attack.
moves:
- **Bolt Strike**: Rakariki launches himself into his target with a speed of a lightning, damaging the opponent with electricity and physical hit.
- **Quick Attack**: This is an even faster move than Bolt Strike because Rakariki doesn't need to think to use this move. It's useful when he needed to evade an attack or needed to test the opponent's skills.
- **Lightning**: When it's raining, Rakariki can use electricity charges on the cloud to summon a lightning to strike his target. Less accurate and also slower than his Bolt Strike, but more lethal than all of his other moves.
- **Last Zap**: Rakariki's last resort attack when he is already out of energy to sustain himself in a battle. He can choose between fleeing the arena or use this move. But if he chose to do this, he will concentrate all of his power into his pendant and then unleashes the rest of his remaining power everywhere in the hopes that it will do enough damage to defeat his opponent.
storyPlotDetails:
* **Antagonist behavior**: His win streak has made him fearless. Rakariki never fear of losing, so he just recklessly doing things. He called Korazu a coward for not able to face him and the situation.
* **Demise**: Rakariki was showing off to Korazu on how fast he can go. Even taunted Korazu to hit him even just once to proof his point. Raining was starting to pour, he began feeling arrogant saying he never lose a battle in a thunderstorm. He miscalculated and jumped to a big chasm, to not be ever seen again. The rain didn't help as he can't even climb the wall even with his super speed because it's slippery.

nameMeaning: Veran (faith, loyal, faithful), verán (Spanish, "ver" = to see)
storyPlotRole: Teaches Zumiko: hope exists not because everything is perfect, but because things can still change
bio: Veranite is a Fennec fox look-alike with dark fur all over the body and some spots that can glow bright yellow. The fur is as dark as the void itself, but his eyes are bright yellow as bright as a star in the middle of a dark, empty space. Veranite has three tails instead of one, and those tails make it seems like he has a cloak covering his back in a battle. In a dark environment, with all of his glow spots glowing, Veranite might look like a galaxy in the sky.
bodyShapeDescription: Veranite looks like a completely dark fennec fox. The fur is as dark as the void itself, fitting to Veranite's attribute. Despite being all dark as his default state, his body actually is covered with some marks that can glow bright yellow. When it actually glow, his body will look like a galaxy in the night sky. Most of the times, his facial expression is quite sad as though he was on the verge of crying everyday. His eyes on the other hand is bright yellow, like double stars in the middle of a dark empty space if not due to his void symbol on his forehead that can also glow. Behind him, Veranite has three completely dark tails which he can use a cloak covering his back in a battle.
personalities:
**Traits** is the consistent outward behavior (what they are). 
**Values** is the internal beliefs / priorities (what they believe). 
**Flaws** is the weaknesses that causes problems (what hurts them). 
**Quirks** is the small habits / physical tells (what leaks through unconsciously).
values: peace
quirks: randomly hiding away from anyone
abilities:
- **Darkness Cloak**: Veranite's ability to hide from his opponent that always works in a dark environment.
- **Darkness Search**: Veranite's ability to search for all things that will work best in a dark environment.
moves:
- **Void of Uncertainty**: Veranite glows and spread dark aura of uncertainty towards everyone nearby, making them doubt themselves and their situation. From his opponent's point of view, the surroundings will become dark, with some random spots of very bright light. Because it's all in their mind, no matter how hard they close their eyes, it will never dim the bright lights. They will become uncertain of their goal and purpose, which Veranite hopes he won't need to continue battling.
- **Void of False Hope**: Veranite glows and spread dark aura of hope towards everyone nearby, making them feeling hopeful of reaching their goal. But because most of the times Veranite is also doubtful of his own goal and hope, everyone affected by this also got the false version of their hope. With false method and false logic, they will succumb to their own scrambled thoughts so Veranite can escape without continuing the battle.
- **Void of Doom**: Veranite's ultimate move when he felt cornered with no way of hiding or escaping the battlefield. He will consume his lights and absorb everything around him, creating a vacuum, almost like a black hole. It's a last resort because he isn't certain that he can survive this at all, but he will do it if it means the opponent also can't escape the doom. The moment things goes into him, he will lose consciousness and he will leave his fate into the vacuum of space.
storyPlotDetails:
* **Antagonist behavior**: Veranite was forced to face Zumiko into a battle despite his sadness. He told Zumiko that he is saddened by the fact he has seen many bad things his boss has done to the world. He acknowledged that he wanted a better world, the one that Myth Seavalanche has maintained in the past.
* **Demise**: Zumiko realized that Veranite has seen everything and yet doesn't want to make a change for the world. Veranite declined Zumiko's suggestion because he believed he could do nothing to fix it. Veranite was then defeated by Zumiko who has realized his own true power of hope after seeing Veranite's lack of believe in change.

name: Fondan

caption.jp: Fondanのオリジナル設定資料。

caption.en: Pretty cool Fondan pose with his white shirt and black tie.
caption.jp: 白いシャツと黒いネクタイを着た、かっこいいFondanのポーズ。

caption.en: Fondan uses Light Pillar. There are three pillars of light visible from far away.

nameMeaning: Fondan: helpful, researcher, foundation. Fondant: cake icing.
storyPlotRole: Teaches Uzakon: true wisdom isn't about knowing everything, but knowing when to act and when to learn
bio: Fondan is a wise anthromorphic wolf with three claws on his hands. His brown fur is rough and unkempt. He has a pair of long white ears and usually wore a white wizard pointy hat and a pair of white half-rim glasses. Fondan also carries a thick spell book that helped to increase his mental prowess. He usually talks in riddles, claimed to know everything in the world.
bodyShapeDescription: Fondan is an anthromorphic wolf that has rough and unkempt fur from head to toe. He wears a pair of white half-rim glasses covering his always droopy eyes. He has a pair of long white ears that is usually covered by a white wizard pointy hat, contrasting his mostly brown fur. Even if his hands are ending in sharp claws, he always brought his brown thick spell book wherever he go. His tail usually lay low like he doesn't have energy to sway it.
personalities:
**Traits** is the consistent outward behavior (what they are). 
**Values** is the internal beliefs / priorities (what they believe).

values: new knowledge
quirks: doesn't really think about anything else other than learning new things
abilities: - **Unfazed**: Fondan's inner ability to be unaffected by emotional attacks. He is always focused to the current situation and his mind stay sharp.
moves:
- **Light of Knowledge**: Fondan summon a bright light using his spell book to burn his target.
- **Light Pillar**: Fondan summon a bright light concentrated into several spots from the sky that looks like big pillars of light to burn his target.
- **Energy Palm**: Fondan can fight in close range using his paws covered with light energy.
- **Last Information**: Fondan's last move if he is cornered and he is very certain his future is no more. He will concentrate all of his light power into his book and throw it as far as possible. His intention is to store the information of his attacker so that others who stumbled upon his book can help spread it. He will then helplessly try to escape the battlefield without attacking back.
storyPlotDetails:
* **Antagonist behavior**: Fondan were facing the very clueless Uzakon in an order by the upper ups. Uzakon was confused on the state of the world and also about his real purpose in the world after he appeared in the world without any past memories. Instead of actually fighting Uzakon, Fondan tried to help him clearing his mind.
* **Demise**: Fondan ended up telling Uzakon the plot of his boss, lamenting he can't do anything about it. Uzakon then tried to convince Fondan to leave, but Fondan insisted to stay saying it's his fate. Fondan loses the battle to Uzakon.

name: Sarchie

caption.jp: Sarchieのオリジナル設定資料。

caption.en: Sarchie uses Wingbeat Screech. Flapping her wings and screeching.

nameMeaning: Sachie (Japanese: happiness, blessed), Archie (German: truly brave)
storyPlotRole: Teaches Vesnea: helping others doesn't mean shutting yourself away, it means connecting with them
bio: Sarchie is a small, lightweight, hummingbird-like creature with incredible agility. She has a long, slender, and pointed beak. Two short head streamers extend from the top of her head, while two longer tail streamers flow from her bird-like tail, both ending in delicate heart shapes. Her beautiful singing has the power to heal an entire village, yet she can also unleash a piercing screech to disorient her opponents.
bodyShapeDescription: Sarchie is a small, lightweight, hummingbird-like creature with incredible agility. She has a long, slender, and pointed beak. Two short head streamers extend from the top of her head, while two longer tail streamers flow from her bird-like tail, both ending in delicate heart shapes. Her feathers are mostly green and light blue, including her streamers. Sarchie has almond-shaped blue eyes that usually are closed whenever she hums happily by herself.
personalities:

abilities: - **Traumatic Instinct**: Sarchie's past made her very sensitive to bad intentions even if the offenders never showed it yet. Her instinct will tell her to avoid them instantly, which in turn saved her from bad things.
moves:
- **Wingbeat Screech**: Sarchie uses her wings combined with her voice to screech loudly at her opponents to hinder their train of thoughts. It can be so loud that it may deafen the target for a short period.
- **Hum of the Heavens**: Sarchie's specialty in healing using her beautiful singing voice. This move can only heal if everyone nearby can hear sounds.
- **Beak Stab**: Sarchie uses her beak to stab her target.
- **Echo Shadow**: Sarchie's last effort to flee from a battle she can't win. She will use a special kind of screech to fool the opponents who believed she is still on the battlefield even though she already fled.
storyPlotDetails:
* **Antagonist behavior**: Sarchie was defending her village when she was "adopted" by her new boss when it was being raided. Now that she works for the new boss, she had to fake her timid personality and take on the boss' orders due to her kidnapped parents being on the line.
* **Demise/Resolution**: Sarchie wasn't fighting Vesnea with her full power even if her moves are mostly for healing. Sarchie mostly told Vesnea her backstory and that in turn inspired Vesnea to change her ways in helping others. At the end of the fight, Vesnea successfully convinced Sarchie to stop working for her boss and instead help her gaining intel from the inside.

name: Deimev

caption.jp: Deimevのオリジナル設定資料。

nameMeaning: Deem (English: to come to think or judge : consider), Domevlo (Ghana: Don't take others at face value), δειμός (Ancient Greek, deimós, “terror”)
storyPlotRole: Teaches Seava: true justice requires understanding, not just rigid rules
bio: Deimev is a big purple bull creature that has wispy endings instead of legs. He floats around with two purple/silver rings behind him called the Judgment Gale. His head has two horns and a big ring accessory on his left ear. He upholds justice no matter the circumstances using his Judgment Gale.
bodyShapeDescription: Deimev is a big purple bull creature that has wispy endings instead of legs. He floats around like a spirit attribute holder does. Two horns sprouted on his head, with a big ring accessory hanging on his left ear. There are two rings called the Judgment Gale that float behind Deimev. The rings are purple on the inside, and silver on the outside where the blade is. It can spin at high speeds, slicing any opponent Deimev deemed necessary.
personalities:
**Traits** is the consistent outward behavior (what they are). 
**Values** is the internal beliefs / priorities (what they believe). 
**Flaws** is the weaknesses that causes problems (what hurts them). 
**Quirks** is the small habits / physical tells (what leaks through unconsciously).
traits: Upholds justice no matter the circumstances, reserved
values: justice
quirks: always wants to have a solo battle despite situation
abilities:
- **Judgment Recoil**: If an attack is justified or hit the target, Deimev got a temporary buff to his strength. On the other hand, if the attack is unjustified or missed the target, Deimev got a temporary debuff to his strength.
- **Phasing**: As a spirit attribute bearer, Deimev can temporarily phase through solid things without much effort. But with a downside that his weapon Judgment Gale will needed to be left behind as it can't phase through things.
moves:
- **Judgment Gale**: Deimev's Judgment Gale spins at high speeds, forming a slicing wind that cuts through anything deemed guilty in his eyes.
- **Unwavering Justice**: Deimev's Judgment Gale cannot be stopped or deflected. If someone tries to evade, it adjusts its trajectory automatically, ensuring a guaranteed punishment.
- **Horn of Pain**: Deimev charges forward using his horns to damage his opponent. If it connects, the receiver will feel short pains on the whole body with a random interval. As long as Deimev is around and is deeming the receiver to be in the wrong, they will keep receiving random pains.
- **Ultimate Punishment**: Deimev's last resort move that he will use if he strongly believed his opponent is really truly in the wrong the whole time. He will concentrate all of his power onto his Judgment Gale that combined it into a singular, bigger Judgment Gale. Then he will throw it onto his opponent which will always connect whether now or later as the bigger Judgment Gale will circle around until it connects. It can slash through boulders without issues so hiding from it is futile.
- **Shameful Retreat**: Deimev's last resort move that he will use if he realized his judgment has been wrong the whole time. He will leave his Judgment Gale behind and run away phasing through objects without attacking or defending back.
storyPlotDetails:
* **Antagonist behavior**: Deimev delivers unwavering, black-and-white justice without considering circumstances. Anyone mistakenly breaking any rule will face the wrath of justice by Deimev, whether a small mistake or a big mistake, whether friend or foe. He upholds justice more than anything else, even his own duty if it means he can deliver the justice he sees fit.
* **Demise**: Seava was having a hard time hitting Deimev due to his agility as a spirit creature. It was amplified by the fact that Seava was still in his unfocused state, with many thoughts running in his mind. But at one point of the battle, Deimev's subordinate was barging in the battle to deliver a message to him, interrupting the battle in the process. Despite his subordinate's insistence that it was important enough to break Deimev's rule of not interrupting battle, he still punishes his subordinate brutally. With a renewed clarity, Seava charged ahead and beat Deimev.
weaponJudgementGale:
**Type**: A floating, segmented ring-blade (chakram-like)
**Appearance**: 
- A large, circular weapon that hovers around Deimev like a halo of judgment.
- The outer ring is shaped like a wind-swept guillotine, shimmering with ethereal energy.
- The inner part consists of five floating, shifting segments that move independently like a spinning balance scale.
- The weapon glows purple and silver, pulsing with energy when delivering a verdict.

**Abilities**:
- **Gale Severance**: The ring spins at high speed, forming a slicing wind that cuts through anything deemed “guilty” in Deimev’s eyes.
- **Binding Guilt**: The weapon can expand, forming chains of wind that restrain those who break the rules, holding them in place for judgment.
- **Absolute Verdict**: When Deimev deems an enemy unworthy, the weapon splits into multiple blades, attacking from different angles with razor-sharp wind.
- **Unwavering Justice**: The weapon cannot be stopped or deflected by trickery. If someone tries to evade, it adjusts its trajectory automatically, ensuring punishment is delivered.
- **Judgment Recoil**: If an attack is unjustified or misses its target, the weapon slightly backfires on Deimev, symbolizing the cost of blind justice.

bio: Tharos is a silver wolf with black markings and black eyes, or a black wolf with silver markings and silver eyes, it is said it will change depends on the angle you see him but no one is sure. As unique as his fur condition is, he has dual attribute and it's the clashing Light and Darkness attribute. Despite this, he leads his team without any signs of dominance or violence as his members always listen to him when he speaks.

His eyes always looks serious even when he is happy, although it is unknown whether he intended that or not. Despite the color of his eyes, it will glow white whenever he uses light-based moves. Above his head there is a tuft of fur that looks like hair, shaped like a moon crescent. When he is seen with silver fur, he seems to have a black aura resembling a cape behind him. And when he is seen with black fur, he seems to have a white aura resembling a cape behind him as well. Furthermore the fur on his legs looks like socks.

name: Nireth
nameMeaning: comes from the word "nihil" (nothing); evokes emptiness or erasure: "nirvana" (liberation through dissolution).
bio: *Write character bio here*
personalities:
**Traits** is the consistent outward behavior (what they are). 
**Values** is the internal beliefs / priorities (what they believe). 
**Flaws** is the weaknesses that causes problems (what hurts them). 
**Quirks** is the small habits / physical tells (what leaks through unconsciously).
traitsTheOutwardBehavior:
- **Graceful & Poised:** She always moves with an effortless, almost unnatural elegance. She never seems flustered or messy.
- **Charismatic/Magnetic:** She has a "star power" that draws people in; she is the person everyone wants to be near or be seen with.
- **Condescendingly Kind:** She doesn't yell; she uses a soft, soothing voice that feels patronizing, like she’s talking to someone who just doesn't understand how the world works.
- **Calculated:** Every word and movement is intentional. She rarely acts on impulse; everything is part of her "image."
valuesTheInternalBeliefs:
- **Order through Uniformity:** She believes that the world is best when everyone stays in their "proper" place and follows a beautiful, predictable pattern.
- **Aesthetic Truth:** To her, if something isn't beautiful or "perfect," it isn't worth acknowledging. She values the _appearance_ of things over the reality of them.
- **Control as Stability:** She believes that true peace only comes from total control: both of herself and of those around her.
flawsTheWeaknesses:
- **Fragile Ego/Identity:** Because her entire existence is built on a "perfect mask," any threat to her image or her control causes her deep, hidden panic.
- **Emotional Illiteracy:** She cannot handle raw, messy, or "ugly" emotions (like Seavalanche's true self). When faced with something she can't categorize or "beautify," she lashes out or tries to erase it.
- **Obsessive Need for Validation:** Despite her power, she is addicted to the "gaze" of others. If people stop looking at her or start seeing through her, she loses her sense of self.
quirksTheSmallHabitstells:
- **The "Perfect" Smile:** She has a smile that never quite reaches her eyes; it’s a practiced, symmetrical expression used to end conversations.
- **Smoothing Gestures:** When she is feeling threatened or losing control, she unconsciously smooths her fins or adjusts her "clothing" with obsessive precision.
- **The Stare:** When she is analyzing someone (or trying to manipulate them), she holds eye contact just a second too long, making the other person feel like they are being "scanned" rather than seen.
bodyShapeDescription:
- **Species:** Deer-Fish Creature.
- **Visual Concept:** "The False Perfection." She is breathtakingly beautiful, designed to look like a high-status, popular figure that everyone admires from afar.
- **Form:** An elegant, elongated silhouette reminiscent of a deer. Her "hair" consists of long, flowing, translucent fins that move as if she is perpetually underwater.
- **Color Palette:** Deep Midnight Blue, Iridescent Silver, and Pale Violet (Cool-toned, regal, and distant).
- **The Antlers:** Crafted from dark, polished obsidian or black crystal, shaped like delicate coral branches. They look like a crown but are sharp, cold, and dangerous.
- **The "Tell":** Her eyes are beautiful, deep ocean pools, but they lack pupils—revealing an endless, dark void beneath the surface.
- **Core Attributes:**
    1. **Magical (Fairy-type):** Used for deception. She uses "Dark Fairy Magic"—spells that look like shimmering, beautiful starlight or glowing petals but are actually made of shadow and emptiness.
    2. **Psionic (Psychic):** Her primary weapon. She attacks the mind, using illusions to gaslight, manipulate emotions, and rewrite a person's sense of reality.
    3. **Darkness:** Her elemental strength. It is used to suppress light/Aether and create a sense of overwhelming weight and "nothingness."
- **Combat Philosophy: "The Velvet Trap"** She does not fight with brute force; she fights by making the opponent doubt their own existence. She uses beauty as bait and psychological pressure as the hook.
- ### Leadership & The Puppeteer Role
- **Method of Control:** She rules through **Psychic Dependency.** She gives her underlings (Arna, Fondan, Deimev) a sense of purpose that satisfies their brokenness, making them feel like they _need_ her to exist.
- **The Hidden Threat:** While she believes she has total control over her "Feared" group, she is being parasitically observed by **Vaurion**, whose Void attribute makes him her natural predator.
abilities: - **The Eclipse of Self (Passive/Aura):** A field of "Heavy Light." When Nireth is near, colors become overly saturated and beautiful, but the atmosphere feels heavy, silent, and suffocating, making it hard for Seavalanche to breathe or think clearly.
moves:
- **Dark Fairy Moths (Surveillance/Control):** Shimmering, dark magical sprites that look like beautiful moths. They act as her Psionic eyes, watching everything in her region and feeding her information.
- **The False Mirror (Psionic Illusion):** She projects a psychic hallucination of the person Seavalanche _thinks_ she should be—a version that is "perfect" and "accepted"—to lure her into a false sense of security.
- **Nihil's Embrace (Ultimate Move):** A devastating combination of Psionic and Darkness. She wraps the target in a sensation of warm, dark velvet. It feels like a comforting hug or a homecoming, but it is actually a void that begins to erase the target's identity, name, and essence until they become "nothing."

name: Zorynthia
nameMeaning: derived from "Zorya" (Slavic goddess of dawn); "Zorion" (Basque: happiness). The name ending "-thia" (ancient Greek) for goddess/divine.
bio: *Write character bio here*
personalities:
**Traits** is the consistent outward behavior (what they are). 
**Values** is the internal beliefs / priorities (what they believe). 
**Flaws** is the weaknesses that causes problems (what hurts them). 
**Quirks** is the small habits / physical tells (what leaks through unconsciously).
traits:
- **Charismatic & Radiant:** She is effortlessly charming and always seems to be "glowing." People are naturally drawn to her presence.
- **Gracious & Poised:** She carries herself with the elegance of a queen. Even when she’s being cruel, she does it with a smile and a soft voice.
- **Performative:** Everything she does feels like a carefully choreographed dance. There is a sense that she is always "on stage."
values:
- **Adoration/Status:** Her primary goal is to be seen, worshipped, and centered. Being ignored is her version of death.
- **Control through Perception:** She believes that if you can control how people _see_ the world, you control the world itself.
- **Self-Preservation (Ego):** She prioritizes her own image and comfort above all else. To her, "truth" is whatever makes her look best.
flaws:
- **Pathological Narcissism:** She cannot truly empathize with others; she only sees people as an audience or as tools to boost her status.
- **Fragile Ego:** Because her entire identity is built on being "perfect" and "bright," any hint of criticism or being "outshone" causes her to spiral into intense, hidden rage.
- **Inauthenticity:** She is so disconnected from her true self that she doesn't actually know who she is when the lights go out.
quirks:
- **The "Perfect" Smile:** When she is angry or threatened, her smile becomes _too_ wide and stays on her face a second too long, making it look uncanny/creepy.
- **Light Manipulation:** When she’s nervous or feeling insecure, the light around her might flicker or become slightly too bright, like a strobe light, betraying her internal instability.
- **Checking her Reflection:** She might unconsciously check her reflection in any surface (even water or a blade) to ensure her "mask" is still perfectly in place.
1VisualDesignTheBlindingGoddessAesthetic:
Since she is a **Fox creature** with **Aether, Light, and Magical** attributes, her look should be overwhelming.
- **The "Halo" Effect:** Instead of just having hair or fur, maybe she has a constant, shimmering aura of Aether/Light that follows her. It’s beautiful, but it’s so bright that when Seavalanche looks at her, she can't see Zorynthia's actual eyes—only the glare. This is a perfect metaphor for how someone can use their "perfection" to hide who they really are.
- **The Fox Features:** Since she's a fox, maybe her tails aren't just fur; maybe they are made of flowing, liquid light or shimmering Aether clouds. They should look elegant and divine, like something out of a myth, making her look more like a goddess than an animal.
- **Color Palette:** I’m thinking golds, iridescent whites, and soft "magical" pastels (pinks/lavenders). But—and here is the twist—the colors should feel _too_ bright, almost "neon" or artificial, so that they feel slightly exhausting to look at for too long.
2AddingASignatureItemOrAccessory:
Every great ruler needs a symbol of their status. Since she wants to be the center of the universe:
- **The Mirror of Adoration:** Maybe she carries a magical mirror (or her Aether creates one). Instead of showing the truth, it shows people what they _want_ to see—making them fall in love with her "glamour." This would be a direct contrast to Seavalanche, who represents Truth.
- **The Crown of False Dawn:** A crown made of solidified Light that actually drains the "color" or "vitality" from the environment around her, making everything else look dull and "weak" so she looks even brighter by comparison.
zorynthiaRefinedDesignTheRadiantFox:
Because she is based on someone who was "popular" and used a beautiful exterior to mask their true intentions, her design should be almost _too_ perfect. It should feel like looking at a high-definition, filtered image that's slightly blinding.
- **The Silhouette:** An elegant, slender Fox creature. Unlike Seavalanche’s soft and natural look, Zorynthia’s silhouette should feel "sculpted" or "regal." Think of her as having a very poised, almost artificial grace.
- **The Fur/Coat:** Her fur shouldn't just be colored; it should seem to _emit_ light. It could have a metallic or pearlescent sheen—like gold leaf or silk—that catches every bit of light in the room.
- **The "Aura" (The Glamour):** She should always appear to have a soft, glowing halo or a shimmering field around her. This is her **Magical** attribute at work—it makes her look divine and approachable, making people _want_ to follow her, even if they feel uneasy.
- **Color Palette:** Since Seavalanche is White/Gold/Pink, Zorynthia should use **Brilliant Gold, Pure White, and a piercing, "Electric" Blue or Violet.** It’s a palette of high status and intense brightness.
abilities:
- **The Illusion of Grandeur:** When she fights, she doesn't just throw bolts of light. She creates massive, beautiful illusions—golden palaces, celestial skies, or overwhelming displays of magic. It’s hard to fight her because the battlefield becomes so "beautiful" and distracting that the protagonist forgets why they are fighting in the first place.
- **The "Weakness" Debuff:** Her attacks could literally make the opponent feel "dimmed." When Seavalanche is hit by Zorynthia's light, she doesn't just take damage; she feels a psychological weight—a feeling that her own magic is small, her own light is flickering, and that she is "not enough."
- **The Gilded Presence (Aura of Adoration)**: Whenever Zorynthia is present, her **Light and Aether** attributes create a "glamour" effect. It makes everything around her look more beautiful, but it also makes people feel small and insignificant in comparison to her. It’s a psychological weight—the feeling that you are just an extra in _her_ movie.
moves:
- **Solar Flare Illusion (The False Truth)**: Using her **Magical** attribute, she creates beautiful, shimmering illusions of "perfection." She can make a wasteland look like a paradise or make herself look even more divine than she is. This mirrors how she used her charm to make you fall in love before the reality set in.
- **Radiance Overload (The Blinding Strike)**: Instead of a physical hit, she releases a massive burst of pure **Aether/Light**. It doesn't just hurt; it _blinds_. It washes out the vision of her enemies, making it impossible for them to see Seavalanche’s true path or even their own hands. It is "The Light that Blinds rather than Guides."
- **The Eternal Spotlight (The Ego Trap)**: Zorynthia focuses all her **Aether and Light** into a single, crushing pillar of radiance centered on her target. To the victim, it feels like being under an interrogation lamp—intense, overwhelming, and impossible to hide from. It forces the target to face her "glory" until their own identity is drowned out by her brilliance. It’s the ultimate expression of her selfishness: _Look at me, and only me._
storyPlotDetails:
*Input anything related to the story plot.* 
Since **The Null** is the environmental threat (the catalyst of chaos) and Zorynthia is a ruler who wants adoration, there could be a very interesting tension there.

- **The Idea:** Maybe Zorynthia's "glamour" is actually her way of trying to _fight off_ The Null. She builds this bright, fake world because she is terrified of the emptiness/depression that The Null represents.
- **The Conflict:** This makes her a more complex villain. She isn't just being selfish for no reason; she’s trying to build a "golden cage" to keep the darkness away, but in doing so, she ends up hurting everyone else (like Seavalanche) by refusing to face the reality of the world.
